summary: Upgraded Worlds Launch with a lightweight animated node-link route layer and reduced-motion fallbacks.
research_influence: Dashboard design pattern research supports compact spatial arrangements instead of long stacked dashboards.
Gamification patterns emphasize levels, progress, avatars, and visible performance paths.
changes: Added renderWorldsLaunchRoute(lanes) to derive route nodes from visible priority lanes.
Added a desktop route-map layer with a glowing line, route runner, active-node pulse, and focus scan.
Kept mobile/tablet compact by hiding the route-map layer and preserving internal action/lane rails.
Added reduced-motion fallbacks for the Worlds launch atmosphere, focus scan, route runner, and active node.
Updated README and contract tests to preserve the motion layer.
next_iteration: Improve animation in the lane detail Path Map without increasing first-screen scroll.
Add richer generated sprite/texture language for bots and lane cards.
Continue replacing static dashboard stacks with compact game-board selectors.
